What We Do

Tax Resolution Services

Every IRS situation is different. We assess your case, build a strategy, and handle the IRS directly on your behalf.

IRS Representation

We stand between you and the IRS. Full Power of Attorney representation for audits, collections, and appeals. You never speak to the IRS directly.

Penalty Abatement

First-time abatement, reasonable cause, and Form 843 preparation to reduce what you owe.

Installment Agreements

Monthly payment plans that fit your budget. Streamlined, partial-pay, and full-pay options.

Offer in Compromise

Settle your tax debt for less than you owe. Eligibility evaluation, application, and negotiation.

Innocent Spouse Relief

Your spouse created the liability. You may qualify for relief from joint responsibility.

Unfiled Returns

We prepare delinquent returns, then negotiate the resulting balance with the IRS.

Track Record

Results That Speak

Real numbers from real cases. No hypotheticals.

About

Experienced.
Direct. Effective.

We focus exclusively on IRS tax resolution. No bookkeeping, no tax prep distractions — strategic representation for taxpayers who need the IRS handled.

Every case starts with a free consultation. We assess your situation, identify the best resolution path, and give you a clear picture of costs and timeline before any work begins.

How It Works

Your Path to Resolution

Three steps. Clear timeline. No surprises.

1

Free Case Evaluation

We review your IRS notices, transcripts, and financial situation to determine the best resolution strategy.

2

Strategy & Engagement

Clear plan with costs, timeline, and expected outcomes. We file Power of Attorney immediately.

3

Resolution

We negotiate directly with the IRS and keep you updated until your case is fully resolved.

Client Reviews

What Clients Say

“
I owed over $45,000 to the IRS and had no idea where to start. They got my penalties reduced by 80% and set up a payment plan I can actually afford.

“
After years of stress and ignored letters, they resolved my case in under 90 days. Professional, responsive, and knew exactly what to do.
